name: fai-teams-plugin
description: Teams integration plugin for FAI — 3 MCP tools, dedicated agent, compatible plays

tools.name: teams_adaptive_card_send
tools.description: Send an Adaptive Card to a Teams channel or chat with interactive elements

tools.name: teams_channel_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Teams channel with formatting and @mentions

tools.name: teams_meeting_schedule
tools.description: Schedule a Teams meeting with participants, agenda, and AI-generated briefing
